intention: 指原始的 Markdown 文档
sentencePatterns: This is the original Markdown document.
You can check the original Markdown document for ...
realLifeExamples: This is the original Markdown document, and you can see the real URL in it.
Please open the original Markdown document for the full link.
usageNotes: 在说明文档来源时，document 比 file 更像是在强调“文档内容本身”。Markdown 通常首字母大写。
productionPrompts: 用 This is the original Markdown document. 造一句和文档或链接有关的英文句子。
